overview: Ilera Precision Wellness is a functional medicine clinic that identifies and treats the root causes of chronic conditions through integrated nutritional science, lifestyle medicine, and advanced lab testing. Care is delivered by a team of functional medicine doctors, health coaches, and nutritionists over a 3-9 month personalized treatment plan.
highlights: Care team includes doctors, health coaches, and nutritionists
Specialty lab testing and advanced diagnostics
targetAudience: Individuals seeking root cause resolution for chronic conditions including fatigue, hormonal imbalance, digestive issues, and metabolic disorders.
